title: Mod Observer Plugin
description: Plugin that lets the server manage mods used by the players.
body:
**DISCLAIMER: This project is experimental**

## Monitor mods on Paper servers
ModObserver lets you monitor and manage the mods used by the player on your server. You can create a whitelist, blacklist and required mods list to do that. You can also use the command */modobserver getMods {playername}* to view the specific mods used by that player.

**The [ModObserver mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-observer) is required to be installed by the players.**

## Features
- **Whitelist**
- **Blacklist**
- **Required mods list**
- **Ignored players list**
- **SHA-256 file integrity verification**
- **Nested mods checking**
- **Incompatible mods GUI**
- **Server config generator**

**Check out our [wiki](https://github.com/Sn0wix/Mod-Observer/wiki)!**

*Just to clarify, this plugin does NOT guarantee, players won't use disallowed mods. This plugin is just another layer of protection you can add to your server.*
